title: MaceSMP-Remake
description: plugin inspired by the Mace SMP Series
body:
> **Disclaimer:** This is an unofficial remake of the MaceSMP plugin concept. I am not affiliated with the original MaceSMP server or team. This plugin is a fan-made recreation and I do not claim any credit for the original gameplay concept.

# ⚔️ MaceSMP
A hardcore survival plugin inspired by the Mace SMP series. Every player spawns with one mace. If you die without a mace in your inventory, you're permanently banned from the server.

[![This Could Be Your Ad](https://i.imgur.com/JTJ56Wb.png)](https://discord.gg/lusik)

## 🔹 Features
- **One Mace Per Player**  
  Players spawn with a single mace on first join.
- **Mace Collection**  
  Kill other players and take their maces. Store backups to stay alive longer.
- **Death Penalty**  
  When you die, your mace drops. Respawn without a mace in your inventory? You're banned.
- **Toggle System**  
  Disable the ban system for early server days (Day 1-4), then enable it when ready (Day 5+).

---

## Commands & Permissions
| Command | Permission | Description |
|---------|------------|-------------|
| `/macesmp toggle` | `macesmp.admin` | Enable/disable the ban system |
| `/macesmp reload` | `macesmp.admin` | Reload the configuration |
| `/macesmp givemace <player>` | `macesmp.admin` | Give a mace to a player |

*Aliases: /msmp, /mace*

---

## How It Works
1. **New players join** → Receive 1 mace
2. **Player dies** → Mace drops on the ground
3. **Player dies again** → Plugin checks inventory for ANY mace
4. **No mace found** → Player is permanently banned
5. **Has backup mace** → Player survives

## Strategy
- Collect maces from defeated players
- Store backup maces in your inventory or enderchest
- One mace drops when you die, but your stored backups keep you alive

---

## Configuration
```yaml
# Enable/Disable ban system (Day 5+ feature)
ban-system-enabled: false

# Give mace on first join
give-mace-on-join: true

# Custom ban reason
ban-reason: "You respawned without a mace - Mace SMP"
```

---

Need help or have suggestions? Feel free to reach out via my [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/BrGdf2GMuT).

**Made by Lusik21556** (@lusik_2155)
